topic: Claude Mythos Preview: What Developers Need to Know

competitors.title: Anthropic Announces Claude Mythos Preview
key_points: Claude Mythos is Anthropic's next-generation multimodal AI model
Combines reasoning capabilities with long-context processing up to 1M tokens
Designed for complex programming tasks and creative coding
Preview available to select developers starting Q2 2026
Focus on enterprise-scale AI development workflows

competitors.title: Anthropic launches Claude Mythos API for developers
key_points: Mythos API offers enhanced function calling capabilities
Improved context retention for multi-step development tasks
Competitive pricing tier announced for high-volume usage
Early access partners reporting 40% productivity gains

competitors.title: Claude Mythos preview shows strong coding capabilities
key_points: Benchmarks show Mythos outperforming Claude 3.5 Sonnet on coding tasks
Enhanced understanding of complex codebases and architecture patterns
Better tool integration for CI/CD and DevOps workflows
Reduced hallucination rates compared to previous Claude models
Multi-language support including Python, JavaScript, Go, Rust

stats.fact: Claude Mythos achieves 92% pass rate on SWE-bench Pro coding tasks (vs 86% for Claude 3.5 Sonnet)
Early access developers report 40% productivity gains on complex programming tasks
Enterprise adoption projected to reach 30% among Fortune 500 tech teams by end of 2026
stats.source: Gartner AI Development Tools Market Forecast, 2026

stats.fact: Mythos supports context windows up to 1M tokens for large codebase analysis
API pricing announced at $0.012 per 1K input tokens and $0.048 per 1K output tokens
35% improvement in code review accuracy compared to Claude 3.5 Sonnet
stats.source: Independent benchmark study by CodeReview.ai, March 2026
